payload.prompt_text: Use opus 4.6 1m ultrathink with extended thinking and chain of thought to first cp this repo into staging tmp location, then fan out and route haiku & sonnet subagents who are assigned oneshot prompts to document and find logic to extract and submit back to a queue jsonl file to prevent race conditions and a locked file from these subagents. Then using opus 4.6 compile the extracted snippets to improve our researchers codebase functionality. Here is the repo, do not try to open the repo through the web , just git clone it to staging tmp location https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
